.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path creation.
Replace deprecated URL(String) constructor with URI.create().toURL() to avoid checked exception handling or deprecation warnings.

src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.general_idea: Added import for org.bson.types.ObjectId to support MongoDB ID handling.
Updated import path for BookRepository to reflect package restructuring.
Added imports for Quarkus Vert.x Web annotations to handle request body and path parameters.
Added import for SmallRye Mutiny Uni to support reactive return types.
Implemented GET endpoint to search books by criteria and search term using regex.
src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.human_impl: @Route(path = "/Books/:criteria/:search", methods = Route.HttpMethod.GET) List<Book> getByCriteria(@Param String criteria, @Param String search) { ... }

src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.general_idea: Implemented GET endpoint to retrieve a single book by its ID.
src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.human_impl: @Route(path = "/Books/:id", methods = Route.HttpMethod.GET) Book getById(@Param String id) { ... }

src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.general_idea: Implemented POST endpoint to create a new book.
src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.human_impl: @Route(path = "/Books", methods = Route.HttpMethod.POST) Uni<Book> create(@Body Book book) { ... }

src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.general_idea: Implemented PUT endpoint to update an existing book.
src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.human_impl: @Route(path = "/Books", methods = Route.HttpMethod.PUT) Uni<Void> update(@Body Book book) { ... }

src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.general_idea: Implemented DELETE endpoint to remove a book by its ID.
src/main/java/org/quarkusmongodb/routes/.human_impl: @Route(path = "/Books/:id", methods = Route.HttpMethod.DELETE) Uni<Void> delete(@Param String id) { ... }

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Bumped the maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.15.0 to support newer JDK features.
Added SmallRye Mutiny release dependency for reactive programming support.
Added Quarkus SmallRye OpenAPI dependency to enable Open API support.
Corrected indentation for quarkus-reactive-routes dependency block.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed indentation from 8 spaces to 6 spaces for consistency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Corrected indentation for quarkus-config-yaml dependency block.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed indentation from 8 spaces to 6 spaces for consistency.

README.md.general_idea: Update README to reflect the specific usage of MongoDB with Panache instead of generic client guides.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced '## Related Guides' and generic MongoDB client link with '## Using MongoDb' and a description of using MongoDB through Panache.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation to README regarding the integration of OpenAPI and Swagger UI.
